_schema.learnings: AI-derived patterns from past social engagement. Injected into next-day social drafts.

learningShape.category: timing | caption_style | image_type | hashtag_set | post_type | platform

learnings.insight: Instagram captions of 100-200 characters get the highest engagement on restaurant accounts. Lead with a hook in the first 90 chars (before 'See more' fold).
Mix 3-5 hyper-local hashtags (#NewMelleMO, #StCharlesEats, #DefianceMO) with 3-5 category tags (#WineBar, #LiveMusic, #STLEats). 30 max but 6-10 is the sweet spot.
Max 2 emojis per caption. Instagram algorithmically downranks emoji-heavy captions. None is fine.
Restaurant social CTAs work better as invitations than commands. 'See you Friday' beats 'Reserve now'.
Restaurant posts perform best at 11am (lunch decision time), 4-5pm (dinner planning), and Sunday 7-8pm (week-ahead browsing). Avoid 1-3pm dead zone.
